description: Measures x-solver decompose strategy consistency across 3 independent trials with different framings on the same problem.

method.problem: xm의 SKILL.md 파일이 500줄을 넘어가면 Claude의 instruction following이 저하된다. 어떻게 해결할 수 있나?

causes: Monolithic file — all skills in single context block
No lazy/partial loading — entire file injected regardless of task
Prose format not optimized for LLM token efficiency

solutions_ranked: CI lint rule enforcing 500-line budget / degradation detection

conclusions: Root cause identification is perfectly consistent (3/3) regardless of framing
Solution ranking is perfectly consistent (Spearman ρ = 1.0 across all pairs)
Sub-problem framing shows controlled variance (4/6 overlap) — exploratory diversity without affecting actionable solutions
decompose strategy is highly deterministic for well-defined technical problems
